title: Chorionic Villus Sampling (CVS): MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ut your results, talk to your provider.
Is there anything else I need to know about CVS testing? 
Some chromosome and genetic disorders require your baby to have extensive medical treatments. Other disorders may not be treatable. 
If your CVS test results were not normal , you should talk with your provider about your options and the decisions you may need to make. It may also help to speak to a genetic counselor Â both before and after you get your results. A genetic counselor is a specially trained professional in genetics and can help you understand what your results mean.
